ideation: This sequence depicts a genie emerging from a bottle, starting with arms tucked in and gradually extending outward. The movements are designed to be fluid and expressive, mimicking the magical unfolding of a genie. I will leverage the robot's shoulder joints to create the effect of arms appearing from within a small space, then gracefully expanding to their full range of motion. Frame 1: Arms start tucked closely to the body, almost as if compressed. Frame 2: Arms begin to extend outward, the hands slightly cupped as if holding something. Frame 3: Arms are fully extended to the side, adopting a welcoming gesture. Frame 4: Arms raise slightly, palms facing upward, as if presenting something magical.

frames.beat: arms emerge tightly bound, contained within the bottle
arms begin to unfurl, hands cupped as if holding magic
genie arms extend fully, a welcoming, expansive gesture
arms lift, presenting the magic with open palms
